# KEGG Cache Directory

This public release does not bundle KEGG-derived pathway mapping CSV files.

When a user selects KEGG in the app, TranscriptoScope can query KEGG REST and write local cache files into this directory. Those generated cache files are third-party KEGG-derived data, are not covered by the TranscriptoScope MIT license, and should not be redistributed unless the redistributor has the required permission or license.
